Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class TransfersFee

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.TransfersFee
public class TransfersFee extends Object
TransfersFee - A transfer using the FEE mechanism. Funds are moved from a customer's brokerage account to the firm account

    • TransfersFee

      public TransfersFee()

  • Method Details

    • amount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TransfersFeeAmount> amount()
      The amount of the fee being charged from the investor's account

    • clientTransferId

      public Optional<String> clientTransferId()
      External identifier supplied by the API caller. Each request must have a unique pairing of client_transfer_id and account

    • description

      public Optional<String> description()
      Optional description information that will attach to this transaction

    • feeOperatingAccount

      public Optional<String> feeOperatingAccount()
      Optional account field to denote where the fee amount should be deposited into. If provided, the account must be a fee operating account. In the case of multiple fee operating accounts under the same correspondent, this field must be provided. If not provided, this will be looked up asynchronously (therefore will not be in the initial response)

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      Full name of the fee resource, which contains account id and fee transaction id

    • state

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<TransfersFeeState> state()
      The current state of the fee

    • type

      public Optional<TransfersFeeType> type()
      The type of the fee being charged

    • builder

      public static final TransfersFee.Builder builder()

    • withAmount

      public TransfersFee withAmount(TransfersFeeAmount amount)
      The amount of the fee being charged from the investor's account

      The amount of the fee being charged from the investor's account

    • withFeeOperatingAccount

      public TransfersFee withFeeOperatingAccount(String feeOperatingAccount)
      Optional account field to denote where the fee amount should be deposited into. If provided, the account must be a fee operating account. In the case of multiple fee operating accounts under the same correspondent, this field must be provided. If not provided, this will be looked up asynchronously (therefore will not be in the initial response)

    • withFeeOperatingAccount

      public TransfersFee withFeeOperatingAccount(Optional<String> feeOperatingAccount)
      Optional account field to denote where the fee amount should be deposited into. If provided, the account must be a fee operating account. In the case of multiple fee operating accounts under the same correspondent, this field must be provided. If not provided, this will be looked up asynchronously (therefore will not be in the initial response)
